name: ultraprompt-marketplace
description: Ultraprompt: cognitive control-plane plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Codex (skills, agents, MCP tools, hooks, commands, dashboards, evidence-led release gates).

plugins.name: ultraprompt
plugins.description: Ultraprompt V8.7 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 49 skills, 30 agents, 43 MCP tools, 31 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V8.7 adds an interactive routing picker (ambiguity-detecting UserPromptSubmit hook + route_picker MCP tool + ultraprompt:choose skill) that surfaces top skill candidates and LLM-rewritten prompt variants via AskUserQuestion with previews.
